---
title: "Robot Rockstars"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
    title-block-banner: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
---

```{=html}
<style>
  :root{
    --navy:#1C355E; --teal:#00AE8D; --teal-lt:#00C9A7;
    --coral:#E96852; --coral-lt:#FF7A5C; --purple:#625D9C; --purple-lt:#9B8EC0;
    --ink:#22303f; --muted:#6b7a8d; --paper:#f6f8fb; --card:#ffffff;
  }
  /* Hide Quarto's default title block — we render our own hero */
  header#title-block-header{ display:none; }
  body{
    background:var(--paper);
    color:var(--ink);
    font-family:"Segoe UI",-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,"Helvetica Neue",Arial,sans-serif;
    margin:0;
  }
  .rr-wrap{ max-width:1100px; margin:0 auto; padding:0 1.1rem 3rem; }

  /* ---- Hero ---- */
  .rr-hero{
    text-align:center; color:#fff; border-radius:0 0 34px 34px;
    padding:2.6rem 1.2rem 2.9rem;
    background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--navy) 0%,var(--teal) 55%,var(--coral) 100%);
    box-shadow:0 12px 30px rgba(28,53,94,.28);
  }
  .rr-hero h1{
    margin:.2rem 0 .35rem; font-size:clamp(2.2rem,6vw,3.6rem); font-weight:800;
    letter-spacing:.5px; text-shadow:0 3px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.22);
  }
  .rr-hero p{ margin:0 auto; max-width:640px; font-size:clamp(1rem,2.4vw,1.3rem); opacity:.96; }
  .rr-emoji{ font-size:clamp(2.4rem,7vw,3.6rem); line-height:1; }
  .rr-pills{ margin-top:1.1rem; display:flex; gap:.5rem; flex-wrap:wrap; justify-content:center; }
  .rr-pill{
    background:rgba(255,255,255,.18); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.35);
    padding:.32rem .8rem; border-radius:999px; font-size:.85rem; font-weight:600; backdrop-filter:blur(2px);
  }

  /* ---- Week section ---- */
  .rr-week{ margin-top:2.4rem; }
  .rr-week-head{
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:.7rem; color:#fff; font-weight:800;
    padding:.7rem 1.1rem; border-radius:16px; font-size:clamp(1.05rem,3vw,1.4rem);
    box-shadow:0 6px 16px rgba(28,53,94,.16);
  }
  .rr-week-head .num{
    background:rgba(255,255,255,.22); border-radius:12px; padding:.15rem .7rem; font-size:.9em;
  }
  .w-teal  { background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--teal),var(--teal-lt)); }
  .w-coral { background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--coral),var(--coral-lt)); }
  .w-purple{ background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--purple),var(--purple-lt)); }

  /* ---- Card grid ---- */
  .rr-grid{
    display:grid; gap:1rem; margin-top:1rem;
    grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(230px,1fr));
  }
  .rr-card{
    position:relative; display:block; text-decoration:none; color:inherit;
    background:var(--card); border-radius:20px; padding:1.1rem 1.1rem 1.2rem;
    border:2px solid #e7edf4; box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(28,53,94,.08);
    transition:transform .16s ease, box-shadow .16s ease, border-color .16s ease;
    overflow:hidden; min-height:150px;
  }
  a.rr-card:hover{
    transform:translateY(-6px); box-shadow:0 16px 30px rgba(28,53,94,.18);
    border-color:var(--teal);
  }
  .rr-badge{
    display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    min-width:2.7rem; height:2.7rem; padding:0 .5rem; border-radius:14px;
    color:#fff; font-weight:800; font-size:1.15rem; letter-spacing:.5px;
    box-shadow:0 3px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.14);
  }
  .b-teal{ background:var(--teal); } .b-coral{ background:var(--coral); } .b-purple{ background:var(--purple); }
  .rr-card-emoji{ float:right; font-size:1.9rem; line-height:1; }
  .rr-card h3{ margin:.7rem 0 .3rem; font-size:1.16rem; font-weight:800; color:var(--navy); }
  .rr-card p{ margin:0; font-size:.9rem; color:var(--muted); line-height:1.4; }

  /* live vs coming-soon */
  .rr-play{
    margin-top:.75rem; display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:.35rem;
    font-weight:700; font-size:.85rem; color:var(--teal);
  }
  .rr-card.soon{ opacity:.6; border-style:dashed; }
  .rr-card.soon h3{ color:#55627a; }
  .rr-ribbon{
    margin-top:.75rem; display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:.35rem;
    font-weight:700; font-size:.8rem; color:#8a95a8;
    background:#eef2f7; padding:.22rem .6rem; border-radius:999px;
  }

  .rr-foot{ text-align:center; color:var(--muted); margin-top:2.6rem; font-size:.85rem; }
  .rr-foot .star{ color:var(--coral); }

  @media (max-width:520px){
    .rr-grid{ grid-template-columns:1fr; }
  }
</style>

<div class="rr-hero">
  <div class="rr-emoji">🤖🎸</div>
  <h1>Robot Rockstars</h1>
  <p>From a box of LEGO to a competition robot — in <strong>5 weeks</strong>! Pick a day and let's build. 🚀</p>
  <div class="rr-pills">
    <span class="rr-pill">🧱 LEGO SPIKE Prime</span>
    <span class="rr-pill">🐍 Python + Pybricks</span>
    <span class="rr-pill">🏆 WRO 2026 RoboMission</span>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="rr-wrap">

  <!-- ============ WEEK 1 ============ -->
  <section class="rr-week">
    <div class="rr-week-head w-teal"><span class="num">Week 1</span> Build, Drive, Sense 🛠️</div>
    <div class="rr-grid">

      <a class="rr-card" href="slides/build-and-test.html">
        <span class="rr-badge b-teal">D1</span><span class="rr-card-emoji">🧱</span>
        <h3>Build Your Robot</h3>
        <p>Meet the WRO, tour the bench, and build a rock-solid driving base — then switch it on!</p>
        <span class="rr-play">▶ Open slides</span>
      </a>

      <a class="rr-card" href="slides/make-it-move.html">
        <span class="rr-badge b-teal">D2</span><span class="rr-card-emoji">🏎️</span>
        <h3>Make It Move</h3>
        <p>Your first program! Speed = distance ÷ time, and turning wheel spins into real centimetres.</p>
        <span class="rr-play">▶ Open slides</span>
      </a>

      <a class="rr-card" href="slides/drive-a-square.html">
        <span class="rr-badge b-teal">D3</span><span class="rr-card-emoji">⬛</span>
        <h3>Drive a Square</h3>
        <p>Loops that repeat, sneaky colon &amp; indent bugs, and why the gyro fixes drifty turns.</p>
        <span class="rr-play">▶ Open slides</span>
      </a>

      <a class="rr-card" href="slides/pid-on-the-gyro.html">
        <span class="rr-badge b-teal">D4</span><span class="rr-card-emoji">🧭</span>
        <h3>Straighten Up!</h3>
        <p>Teach the robot to self-correct: gentle turns, your first <code>def</code>, and the magic P-term.</p>
        <span class="rr-play">▶ Open slides</span>
      </a>

      <a class="rr-card" href="slides/drivebase-shortcut.html">
        <span class="rr-badge b-teal">D5</span><span class="rr-card-emoji">🎯</span>
        <h3>Bullseye Shortcut</h3>
        <p>Finish PID, learn the wheel geometry, and earn the powerful <code>DriveBase</code> shortcut.</p>
        <span class="rr-play">▶ Open slides</span>
      </a>

    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- ============ WEEK 2 ============ -->
  <section class="rr-week">
    <div class="rr-week-head w-coral"><span class="num">Week 2</span> Score the Field, Form the Teams 🗺️</div>
    <div class="rr-grid">

      <div class="rr-card soon">
        <span class="rr-badge b-coral">D6</span><span class="rr-card-emoji">🚦</span>
        <h3>Stop &amp; React</h3>
        <p>Use a motor as a sensor, back off on a bump, and make decisions with <code>if / else</code>.</p>
        <span class="rr-ribbon">🔒 Coming soon</span>
      </div>

      <div class="rr-card soon">
        <span class="rr-badge b-coral">D7</span><span class="rr-card-emoji">🛣️</span>
        <h3>Follow the Line</h3>
        <p>From wobbly bang-bang to smooth PD line-following — and squaring up at junctions.</p>
        <span class="rr-ribbon">🔒 Coming soon</span>
      </div>

      <div class="rr-card soon">
        <span class="rr-badge b-coral">D8</span><span class="rr-card-emoji">🔌</span>
        <h3>Cables &amp; Microphone</h3>
        <p>Build mechanism #1: hook the cables (30 pts) and nail the microphone (20 pts).</p>
        <span class="rr-ribbon">🔒 Coming soon</span>
      </div>

      <div class="rr-card soon">
        <span class="rr-badge b-coral">D9</span><span class="rr-card-emoji">🎹</span>
        <h3>Instruments &amp; Dodging</h3>
        <p>Mechanism #2: place the instruments (45 pts) and grab the avoidance bonus (+40).</p>
        <span class="rr-ribbon">🔒 Coming soon</span>
      </div>

      <div class="rr-card soon">
        <span class="rr-badge b-coral">D10</span><span class="rr-card-emoji">🤝</span>
        <h3>Gold Robot &amp; Teams</h3>
        <p>Pass the gold-reference gate, split into teams, and meet <code>RobotConfig</code>.</p>
        <span class="rr-ribbon">🔒 Coming soon</span>
      </div>

    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- ============ WEEK 3 ============ -->
  <section class="rr-week">
    <div class="rr-week-head w-purple"><span class="num">Week 3</span> Chain the Anchor Run ⛓️</div>
    <div class="rr-grid">

      <div class="rr-card soon">
        <span class="rr-badge b-purple">D11</span><span class="rr-card-emoji">📝</span>
        <h3>The Mission List</h3>
        <p>Store the whole run in a list and let a mission runner play it step by step.</p>
        <span class="rr-ribbon">🔒 Coming soon</span>
      </div>

      <div class="rr-card soon">
        <span class="rr-badge b-purple">D12</span><span class="rr-card-emoji">🔌</span>
        <h3>Add the Cables</h3>
        <p>Drop the cables segment right into the middle of the run.</p>
        <span class="rr-ribbon">🔒 Coming soon</span>
      </div>

      <div class="rr-card soon">
        <span class="rr-badge b-purple">D13</span><span class="rr-card-emoji">🎹</span>
        <h3>Add the Instruments</h3>
        <p>Chain the instruments segment into the growing run.</p>
        <span class="rr-ribbon">🔒 Coming soon</span>
      </div>

      <div class="rr-card soon">
        <span class="rr-badge b-purple">D14</span><span class="rr-card-emoji">🎤</span>
        <h3>Mic + Dodge</h3>
        <p>Fold the microphone and the dodge move into the run.</p>
        <span class="rr-ribbon">🔒 Coming soon</span>
      </div>

      <div class="rr-card soon">
        <span class="rr-badge b-purple">D15</span><span class="rr-card-emoji">🧩</span>
        <h3>Full Anchor Run</h3>
        <p>Connect every piece — the whole ~135-point run, start to finish!</p>
        <span class="rr-ribbon">🔒 Coming soon</span>
      </div>

    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- ============ WEEK 4 ============ -->
  <section class="rr-week">
    <div class="rr-week-head w-teal"><span class="num">Week 4</span> Make It Reliable 🎯</div>
    <div class="rr-grid">

      <div class="rr-card soon">
        <span class="rr-badge b-teal">D16</span><span class="rr-card-emoji">⏱️</span>
        <h3>Lock the Anchor</h3>
        <p>Run under 2:00 — and land it clean 10 times in a row.</p>
        <span class="rr-ribbon">🔒 Coming soon</span>
      </div>

      <div class="rr-card soon">
        <span class="rr-badge b-teal">D17</span><span class="rr-card-emoji">🔍</span>
        <h3>Find the Bug</h3>
        <p>Log failures, hunt the root cause, and keep a calibration diary.</p>
        <span class="rr-ribbon">🔒 Coming soon</span>
      </div>

      <div class="rr-card soon">
        <span class="rr-badge b-teal">D18</span><span class="rr-card-emoji">🎶</span>
        <h3>The Fixed Notes</h3>
        <p>Add the green &amp; red notes (+40 → ~175) and draft your Technical Summary.</p>
        <span class="rr-ribbon">🔒 Coming soon</span>
      </div>

      <div class="rr-card soon">
        <span class="rr-badge b-teal">D19</span><span class="rr-card-emoji">🛡️</span>
        <h3>Venue-Proof It</h3>
        <p>HSV colour calibration, retry logic, and hardening for a strange room.</p>
        <span class="rr-ribbon">🔒 Coming soon</span>
      </div>

      <div class="rr-card soon">
        <span class="rr-badge b-teal">D20</span><span class="rr-card-emoji">✅</span>
        <h3>Reliability Check</h3>
        <p>The Week-4 gate: hit ~175 points, 20 tries, 90%+ of the time.</p>
        <span class="rr-ribbon">🔒 Coming soon</span>
      </div>

    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- ============ WEEK 5 ============ -->
  <section class="rr-week">
    <div class="rr-week-head w-coral"><span class="num">Week 5</span> Color, Notes &amp; the Mock Qualifier 🏆</div>
    <div class="rr-grid">

      <div class="rr-card soon">
        <span class="rr-badge b-coral">D21</span><span class="rr-card-emoji">🌈</span>
        <h3>Randomized Notes</h3>
        <p>Map colours to targets and chase the four surprise notes (+80 stretch).</p>
        <span class="rr-ribbon">🔒 Coming soon</span>
      </div>

      <div class="rr-card soon">
        <span class="rr-badge b-coral">D22</span><span class="rr-card-emoji">🎙️</span>
        <h3>Interview Ready</h3>
        <p>Finish the Technical Summary — both teammates ready to talk about the robot.</p>
        <span class="rr-ribbon">🔒 Coming soon</span>
      </div>

      <div class="rr-card soon">
        <span class="rr-badge b-coral">D23</span><span class="rr-card-emoji">🥊</span>
        <h3>Mock Qualifier</h3>
        <p>Practice check-in, the Surprise Rule, and go head-to-head!</p>
        <span class="rr-ribbon">🔒 Coming soon</span>
      </div>

      <div class="rr-card soon">
        <span class="rr-badge b-coral">D24</span><span class="rr-card-emoji">💯</span>
        <h3>Chase the 255</h3>
        <p>Push for the full 255 points and lock in your strongest setup.</p>
        <span class="rr-ribbon">🔒 Coming soon</span>
      </div>

      <div class="rr-card soon">
        <span class="rr-badge b-coral">D25</span><span class="rr-card-emoji">🎉</span>
        <h3>Showcase Day</h3>
        <p>Pick the team, plan what's next, and show off your rockstar robot!</p>
        <span class="rr-ribbon">🔒 Coming soon</span>
      </div>

    </div>
  </section>

  <div class="rr-foot">
    Made for Robot Rockstars <span class="star">★</span> WRO 2026 RoboMission Elementary
  </div>

</div>
```
